RG: Responsible Gambling — the broad term for industry practices that help players manage their time and money
WCAG: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines — international standards for making web content accessible to people with disabilities
RTP: Return to Player — the theoretical percentage of wagered money a game pays back over time
EV: Expected Value — the average amount a player can expect to win or lose per bet over the long run
RNG: Random Number Generator — the algorithm that determines outcomes in digital gambling games, ensuring each result is independent
GTO: Game Theory Optimal — a mathematically balanced strategy that cannot be exploited, commonly referenced in poker
ICM: Independent Chip Model — a mathematical model used in poker tournaments to assign monetary value to chip stacks
DSM: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders — the standard classification of mental disorders used by mental health professionals
CTA: Call to Action — a prompt that encourages a specific response from the user (e.g., button text, link text)
MAU: Monthly Active Users — the count of unique users who engage with a product within a calendar month
MVP: Minimum Viable Product — the simplest version of a deployment that delivers core value
CTR: Click-Through Rate — the percentage of users who click on a specific link or element
CC0: Creative Commons Zero — a public domain dedication that waives all copyright, allowing unrestricted use
